typography.heading_strategy: Ultra-bold, uppercase, tall typography for a print-based fashion editorial look.
typography.body_strategy: Clean, highly readable geometric sans for contrast.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous (p-8 to p-24) to create a gallery/exhibition feel.
layout_strategy.grid: Asymmetric bento for homepage features; strict 3-col or 4-col grids for product catalogs.
layout_strategy.borders: Minimal to none. Rely on whitespace and scale for hierarchy.

component_guidelines.navigation: Sticky top, white background with backdrop blur. High contrast black logo. Minimalist links.
component_guidelines.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Black background, white text for primary. White background, black border for secondary. Add group-hover inverted effects.
component_guidelines.cards_product: Borderless. Full width image. Product name and price below in minimal text. No 'Add to Cart' button visible until hover.
component_guidelines.hero: Massive typography overlapping edge-to-edge imagery. Minimalist overlays.

hero_image.description: Stylish fashion poses with motion blur background, highlighting modern attire.

category_men.description: Stylish young man wearing denim, showcasing modern urban fashion.

category_women.description: Fashionable young women posing confidently, showcasing modern trends.

category_accessories.description: Closeup of fashion jewelry with spiked chains and necklaces, showcasing edgy style.

product_tshirt.description: Oversized white T-shirt featuring bold printed text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a full e-commerce flow: Home, Men, Women, Accessories, Product Detail, Cart, and Checkout.
Use Shadcn UI but heavily customize it to remove the 'tech/SaaS' look. Use rounded-none for buttons and inputs.
Import 'Bebas Neue' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in the index.html or global css.
Ensure the hero section makes a bold statement with typography over the provided hero image.
Product images must use the provided Pexels placeholders since users will upload their own later.
Implement a shopping cart state and basic product management data structure.
Do NOT use placeholder URLs like via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the media URLs provided here.
